description: Style NoteAn eclectic fusion of hot style and cutting edge design, this shoe from flying machine is a great way to attain a cult status. Made with a canvas and rubber upper, this is a must-have in your casual wardrobe.Product DetailsCanvas upper with rubber toe box, central lace-ups and synthetic overlaysPadded tongue and innerEVA midsoleDurable rubber outsole with herringbone grooves on the medial side and brick-styled grooves on the lateral sideLace colour may vary Material and CareCanvas, rubberMake a paste using 1 tbsp of baking soda, 1 tbsp white vinegar and 1 tbsp hot waterRub this paste onto the canvas and the sole using a brushWash off with lukewarm water.
